as you want every day.

paywall.terms.preamble: By subscribing you agree to our
paywall.autoRenewDisclosure: Subscription renews automatically unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Payment is charged to your iTunes / Google Play account at purchase confirmation. Manage your subscription in your account settings.
paywall.alert.signInBody: Sign in with Google or Apple to subscribe.
paywall.alert.notRestoredBody: If you've subscribed before, sign in with the same account.

settings.nativeLanguageHint: Sets both the interface language and the word-translation language
settings.targetLanguageHint: Pick the language you want to learn

slide1.title:
Start with the words
you'll see most often
slide1.text:
Levels are ordered by word frequency,
from common to rare.

slide2.title:
Stay in control

slide2.text:

revisit what you forgot.
